alert_subject: Cloud Run Revision cuiz-ai-api-00127-gcx elevated API errors
diagnosis: The sync-inactive-users scheduled job fires 1200+ requests to Email Octopus API with no throttling, causing 429 Too Many Requests errors. All errors at email_service.py:325 (get_contact_by_email). Root cause: no rate limiting or retry logic in batch Email Octopus operations.
summary: Added retry with exponential backoff on 429 in EmailService and 0.5s inter-request throttle in scheduled jobs. Changes ready on local branch fix/email-octopus-rate-limiting, PR creation blocked by tooling issue - manual push needed.
